sections.content: New state 36! Clicking (12, 51) from state 35 created a new state. I can see a white pixel appeared near the gray diamond. Let me check what changed.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
after = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("=== Changed cells ===")
for r in range(len(after)):
    for c in range(len(after[r])):
        if r < len(before) and c < len(before[r]) and after[r][c] != before[r][c]:
            print(f"  ({r},{c}): {before[r][c]} -> {after[r][c]}")

# Check key colored centers
ascii_grid = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Key colored centers ===")
for r in range(len(ascii_grid)):
    for c in range(len(ascii_grid[r])):
        ch = ascii_grid[r][c]
        if ch in 'MOw':
            print(f"  ({r},{c}): {ch}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
